zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Maitland於1380年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾費易維時，她的父親Robert Maitland Laird of Gight50歲，母親Margaret Innes31歲。她於大約1404年與John Gordon of Scurdargue在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾艾希享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Maitland于1380年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾費易維时，她的父亲Robert Maitland Laird of Gight50岁，母亲Margaret Innes31岁。她于大约1404年与John Gordon of Scurdargue在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾艾希享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maitland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): nickname for an ungracious individual, from Old French maltalant, mautalent ‘anger, vexation, spite’ (from Late Latin malum ‘bad’ + talentum ‘inclination, disposition’).

variants.name: Maitlen
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish andEnglish   Maitland  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Maitland was born in 1380, in Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Robert Maitland Laird of Gight, was 50 and her mother, Margaret Innes, was 31. She married John Gordon of Scurdargue about 1404, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1440, in Essie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Maitland est née en 1380, à Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Maitland Laird of Gight, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Innes, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Gordon of Scurdargue environ 1404, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Essie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Maitland 1380 in Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Maitland Laird of Gight 50 und ihre Mutter Margaret Innes 31. Sie hat um 1404 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland John Gordon of Scurdargue geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Essie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maitland è nata il nel 1380 nel Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Maitland Laird of Gight, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Margaret Innes, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Gordon of Scurdargue circa 1404, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1440, nel Essie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maitlandが1380年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフイヴィで生まれた時，父Robert Maitland Laird of Gightは50歳，母Margaret Innesは31歳であった。約1404年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでJohn Gordon of Scurdargueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアエシで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maitland(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 피비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Maitland Laird of Gight(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Innes(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 John Gordon of Scurdargue(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 에시에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maitland nasceu em 1380, em Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Maitland Laird of Gight, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Innes, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gordon of Scurdargue aproximadamente 1404, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Essie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Maitland родилась в 1380 г. в местности фиви, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Maitland Laird of Gight было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Innes, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gordon of Scurdargue около 1404 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности эсси, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Maitland nació en 1380, en Fyvie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Maitland Laird of Gight, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Innes, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Gordon of Scurdargue aproximadamente 1404, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1440, en Essie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años.
